name: Allequash Creek Site
VegetationDescription(IGBP): Permanent Wetlands: Lands with a permanent mixture of water and herbaceous or woody vegetation that cover extensive areas. The vegetation can be present in either salt, brackish, or fresh water
ClimateClassDescription(Koeppen): Warm Summer Continental: significant precipitation in all seasons

name: ARM Southern Great Plains site- Lamont
VegetationDescription(IGBP): Croplands: Lands covered with temporary crops followed by harvest and a bare soil period (e.g., single and multiple cropping systems). Note that perennial woody crops will be classified as the appropriate forest or shrub land cover type.
ClimateClassDescription(Koeppen): Humid Subtropical: mild with no dry season, hot summer
